properties.description: Identifies a Vaikora for O365 engine outage by absent quarantine telemetry. Fires when a tenant active in the last 24 hours has sent no rows in the last two hours, indicating the customer VM is unhealthy or the Graph subscription has lapsed.

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: No Vaikora-O365 quarantine telemetry has arrived from this tenant in the last 2 hours. Last seen: {{LastSeen}}.

properties.name: Vaikora - Engine offline
